text.content: MAXAM Supplies OTR Solutions to CASE Construction Equipment

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Supplies OTR Solutions to CASE Construction Equipment

text.content: CASE Construction Equipment approves MAXAM Tires as standard fitment on Wheel Loaders

rich_text.plain_text: CASE Construction Equipment approves MAXAM Tires as standard fitment on Wheel Loaders

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, July 26th, 2022] MAXAM Tire has strengthened its relationship with CNH Industrial North America by providing its OTR solutions to CASE wheel loaders.

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, July 26th, 2022] MAXAM Tire has strengthened its relationship with CNH Industrial North America by providing its OTR solutions to CASE wheel loaders.

text.content: With over 180 years of experience, CASE has been transforming the construction industry. MAXAM is pleased to expand its growing supply capability to deliver both radial and bias OTR tires to another global construction equipment manufacturer.

rich_text.plain_text: With over 180 years of experience, CASE has been transforming the construction industry. MAXAM is pleased to expand its growing supply capability to deliver both radial and bias OTR tires to another global construction equipment manufacturer.

text.content: CASE wheel loaders manufactured at CNH Industrial’s Fargo Wheel Loader Factory are now available for order with MAXAM tires as a standard product.

rich_text.plain_text: CASE wheel loaders manufactured at CNH Industrial’s Fargo Wheel Loader Factory are now available for order with MAXAM tires as a standard product.

text.content: The MAXAM MS912 aggressive R4 OTR tire is a standard product on the 28,159-pound CASE 621G wheel loader. The MS912 is a heavy-duty bias construction tire that is designed to maximize traction in soft underfoot conditions. Engineered with a self-cleaning tread design and a wear/cut-resistant compound, the MS912 delivers guaranteed performance and value.

rich_text.plain_text: The MAXAM MS912 aggressive R4 OTR tire is a standard product on the 28,159-pound CASE 621G wheel loader. The MS912 is a heavy-duty bias construction tire that is designed to maximize traction in soft underfoot conditions. Engineered with a self-cleaning tread design and a wear/cut-resistant compound, the MS912 delivers guaranteed performance and value.

text.content: Similar to other MAXAM’s construction products, the MS912 is manufactured with premium materials and a strict quality insurance process. It is such standard and quality that allows MAXAM to achieve this significant partnership with CASE in the construction sector, providing businesses and operations maximum efficiency and performance globally. MAXAM’s goal is to not only be a comprehensive full-range supplier and an excellent business partner for world-class OEMs such as CASE but to also increase end users’ overall productivity.

rich_text.plain_text: Similar to other MAXAM’s construction products, the MS912 is manufactured with premium materials and a strict quality insurance process. It is such standard and quality that allows MAXAM to achieve this significant partnership with CASE in the construction sector, providing businesses and operations maximum efficiency and performance globally. MAXAM’s goal is to not only be a comprehensive full-range supplier and an excellent business partner for world-class OEMs such as CASE but to also increase end users’ overall productivity.

text.content: “This partnership highlights MAXAM’s growth ambitions in the OTR sector and our commitment to providing superior solutions to our customers globally. Designed to maximize traction while delivering improved rim pull, fuel savings, and enhanced tire wear, MAXAM’s OTR tires are engineered with the customer in mind,” says Jimmy McDonnell, VP of Sales and Marketing at MAXAM Tire North America.

Designed to maximize traction while delivering improved rim pull, fuel savings, and enhanced tire wear, MAXAM’s OTR tires are engineered with the customer in mind,” says Jimmy McDonnell, VP of Sales and Marketing at MAXAM Tire North America.

text.content: For more information on MAXAM’s supply agreement with CASE, please contact your local representative or visit us at maxamtire.com
